commands.review_summary:
This PR rewrites plugin getting-started docs, updates related plugin CLI/hook/manifest wording and glossary terms, changes generated inventory template text, adds `.agents` ignore rules, and makes a small install-security-scan string check change.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a reported runtime bug; this is a docs/tooling PR. The review blockers are source-reproducible by comparing PR-head generator text with the unchanged generated page and checking the PR-head `.gitignore` pattern against current `.agents` contents.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor current-head real behavior proof plus protected-label docs/plugin owner handling; repair automation should not run while proof is insufficient.
